attributes.additional_details: Because yet again we have seen the depraved indifference to animal welfare, and utter cruelty towards horses at this year's Aintree festival. A horse had its back broken from jumping and the jockey still flogged the poor animal into running until it crossed the finish line.
attributes.background: Time to shut down the horse racing industry. No more races, no more betting.

rejection.details:
You may wish to sign this petition which calls for a similar action: 
Ban horse racing in the UK and fund transition to lifelong horse welfare safely. https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/767059
